goals.objective: coverage 관련 탭에 어떤 coverage가 있고 어떤 종류가 있으며 왜 만족되지 않았는지 RTL 코드와 연동해서 보여준다. 기존 sim/lint 연동과 유사하게 coverage 탭에서 VCD toggle coverage는 어디가 얼마나 만족하는지 리포트와 상세를 RTL로 연결하고 static coverage도 동일하게 RTL 코드와 연결한다.

evidence: C001/C002/C003 all pass. Coverage tab now lists Verilator/static/VCD/FL/CL coverage, shows unmet reasons and details, links static/VCD/source-backed coverage rows into the existing RTL preview path, preserves lint preview behavior, and has browser QA screenshots/text evidence plus targeted Vitest, tsc, build, diff-check, and slop audit evidence.

goal.objective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e7e69-3956-76b0-89df-6acc580185bd/goals.json: add a coverage tab that explains coverage types, unmet reasons, VCD toggle/static coverage details, and RTL code linkage analogous to existing sim/lint integration.

aiSlopCleaner.evidence: Changed-file slop audit after behavior was locked by tests: no new `as any`, TS ignore directives, console.log, or dangerouslySetInnerHTML in the new coverage modules/test; pure LOC stays below 250 for coverage-report-model.ts, coverage-report-details.tsx, coverage-report-card.tsx, coverage-report-summary.tsx, and workspace-lint-coverage.tsx. Self-review found VCD unmet reason truncation risk and invalid pct display rough edge; both were fixed before final verification.

verification.evidence: Final post-cleanup verification passed: diff check clean; slop scan produced no matches; TypeScript noEmit passed; targeted Vitest passed 3 files / 8 tests; Vite production build passed with only existing vendor-script and chunk-size warnings. Browser QA evidence C001/C002/C003 was captured earlier with Playwright fallback because the in-app Browser connector was unavailable.

codeReview.evidence: Final review attempted through codex-ultrawork-reviewer and a narrow worker review; both review agents timed out without returning findings. Local final code-review then inspected the changed files and line-level behavior: coverage JSON is normalized from unknown values before render; React text escaping is preserved; source-backed coverage rows use LintDiagnostic-compatible payloads; workspace-lint-coverage only re-exports the new coverage summary and leaves lint rendering in place. One visual issue was found and fixed: VCD unmet reason now spans the full row width instead of truncating in a narrow grid column. No remaining blockers found.
